queries.question: Display documentaries and short films with a budget of $500,000.
queries.sql:
SELECT Documentaries.title
FROM Documentaries
WHERE Documentaries.Budget = "500000"
UNION
SELECT ShortFilms.title
FROM ShortFilms
WHERE ShortFilms.Budget = "500000"
